{{Infobox character
| name = Elysian
| introduced = House of Blades
}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|The [[Elysian]] is expected to come to [[Leah]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c13">''House of Blades'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|There are [[Elysian]] soldiers in [[Enosh]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Elysian creatures]] include gnomes and [[Gold]] soldiers.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c12">''City of Light'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
